name: Yogurt Deviled Eggs
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Parsley flakes or freeze-dried chives
1 tsp Lemon juice or dry vermouth
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggs in half lengthwise.
2. Remove yolks and set whites aside.
3. Mash the yolks with a fork.
4. Blend in remaining ingredients until well combined.
5. Refill egg whites using about 1 tablespoon of yolk mixture for each egg half.
